<font color="#00FF00">Green line</font> — OSPFv3 link (Area 20)
<font color="#00FF00">Green box</font> — NSSA Area 20
Pure IPv6 topology — no IPv4 routing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="220" x="378" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Red border — ASBR router
Gold border — ABR router
White border — Internal router
Gold dashed line — EIGRPv6 link
White line — OSPFv3 link (Area 0/10)
Green line — OSPFv3 link (Area 20)
Green box — NSSA Area 20
Pure IPv6 topology — no IPv4 routing

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
